title: 151 Products TT1004 Tape, Grey
features: BONDS TO VIRTAULLY ANY SURFACE! 151 Duct Tape, 10 metres, ready to use and apply to virtually any surface. High grab adhesive, cut to required length, securely bond and attach items, pack and wrap bags or boxes with 151 Duct Tape.

TOUGH, HEAVY DUTY SECURE TAPE: 151 Duct Tape, silver grey in colour, repair, label and seal with this secure, tough heavy duty, versatile tape. Use marker pen to write on tape for long term storage items.
DURABLE, STRONG BONDING SOLUTION: 151 Duct Tape, a cost-effective general-purpose duct tape. Perfect for application in moist or humid environments, tape resists moisture in and outdoors.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use, 10 Metre Roll 151 Duct tape. Store at room temperature
